reasoning: The control CA-2 (2) focuses on specialized security assessments, which in the context of Kubernetes can be mapped to ensuring that security mechanisms are in place and operational. This includes audit logging to track security events, admission controllers to enforce security policies, RBAC to ensure least privilege access, and network policies to control ingress traffic. These checks ensure that Kubernetes clusters are assessed for security compliance in a specialized manner.
title: Control Assessments | Specialized Assessments
